"C:\Program Files\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Sutrika_AddOn.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Sutrika_AddOn.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Sutrika_AddOn.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\CODEBL~1\MinGW\bin\C__~1.EXE -O3 -DNDEBUG -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -shared -o sutrika.node -Wl,--out-implib,libsutrika.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Sutrika_AddOn.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\Sutrika_AddOn.dir\linkLibs.rsp
